meta.address: 3860 Carp Rd, Carp, ON
meta.fun_fact: Irish Hills sits just outside the village of Carp, ON — home to the Diefenbunker, Canada's Cold War nuclear bunker. Built in 1959 to shelter 535 government officials, it was kept secret for decades and is now a national museum.

reviews.text: Very well run, from the girl on the phone who took the tee time, the pro shop to the starter, all were first class. Course was under repair in a few places, looked like some big storm damage, but greens and fairways were in great shape

The golf course is amazing and the greens are well maintained. My husband and I had a blast golfing on our day off. They have an onsite restaurant that serves breakfast, lunch and dinner.  The prices for lunch menu are affordable. I had the Chicken Wrap and it was pretty good!…

We hosted our Babes & Boo’s Golf Tournament at Irish Hills and I can confidently say it was the smoothest, best-run event I’ve ever organized! From start to finish, the staff went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect.

The course was in beautiful shape, the acc…

I had a wonderful experience today as a first time golfer. The staff were exceptional friendly and did a great job at ensuring I was comfortable!

The manager Jeff took the time to give me a tour around the golf club and a crash course lesson in golf! Jeff was patient and ensu…
Fantastic party - Irish hills hosted a group of 40 people at their simulators - very kid friendly. Everyone had a great time. Chef Jen is fantastic. Highly recommended for any occasion.

reviews.text: Nice spot, greens were in good shape. Quite dry for this early in the season. Looking forward to more games here.
We enjoyed the golf course; well maintained with interesting obstacles. We were warned about Ladies Night and we did have time to complete our 9 holes.

Our Group had an awesome summer Golfing the course was in great shape. Everyone working there were just so pleasant and always had time for a quick chat . We Golf 5 days a week and loved it .Thank you Jay and everyone that worked there .We will see you in the Spring
Beautiful little course with great conditions!  Played with a couple of members there while visiting from NB and it just made the experience that much better!

Beauty course. Well maintained and relaxed atmosphere. Played 18 with my buddy the other day and was impressed with the course. Greens are super challenging and besides the 1st,9th and 18th no two holes are the same. Highly recommended.

reviews.text:
Pros:
- nice hole layouts, with a few bends and elevation changes.
- fairways and greens were in excellent shape and rolling well
- deer sightings!

Cons:
- bugs were relentless and unbearabl. They were present everywhere on the Legacy course (even in the middle of a wide open…

Played the front 9 and it was a nice long course that was pretty well maintained. It's a lot of long par 4's and par 5's thar are very open. The fairways were like carpets and the greens were nicely maintained. My only gripe was that the course was VERY wet while I played. It …

Nice, well maintained course but was a little backed up halfway through. Four groups all bunched up at each tee off which became very frustrating. Clubhouse is a little tired but food staff are great and the food is very good.

Absolutely rock solid course all throughout the board, beautifully kept, 2 amazing 18's with distinctly different feelings and vibes, the premiere is a bit more open and forgiving while the legacy is a bit trickier with many demanding tee shots. The fairways are like carpet an…

One of my favourite courses in the greater Ottawa area. Conditions are always top notch and despite a slight price increase this season it is still a great price for the quality of course. Legacy is the more challenging of the 18 hole options with much more variation between h…

reviews.text: It's a very good golf course, well maintained fairway.

A gem of a course just outside of Stittsville on Fernbank road, nothing too strenuous but beautifully manicured with several tight drives between tree-lined fairways. The course will provide a challenge for all levels of golfer and is quickly becoming my favourite course in th…

In very good condition for such an early spring.
Fairways are great and green are amazing.
Very open course, good for high hcpers like me.
The course was moving at a good pace today. Finished 18 holes in about 4 hours.  Well spaced out between groups.

Stittsville Golf Course hosted our company Christmas party this season. Can’t say enough about the awesome food, amazing staff and great location! Thanks so much for having us, will definitely be back!!!

reviews.text: This was only my second time playing golf, and I was looking forward to learning with my more experienced partner and brother. Unfortunately, just 5 minutes after teeing off, staff asked us to hurry up and pick up our ball. As paying customers, we felt rushed and singled out i…

Worst golf experience I have ever had. We played the east 9 hole course. By the fourth hole the ranger - Marc - showed up telling us to play faster (we as a foursome were already not playing slow - an hour in by the end of hole 5). The people behind us were waiting once or twi…
1st time playing this course. Very nice. West course isn’t long but it’s tight with a lot of holes with left or right doglegs.
Absolutely stunning golf course! I appreciate the rate of play, the fancy carts, and all the great staff. You will always have a good time when you visit.
Played here yesterday for the first time. Course is spectacular and impeccable condiotions. Staff is friendly and helpful. One of my favourite courses so far this year!

reviews.text:
To the ownership & management.
On Sunday, August 24th, my daughter and I tee'd of at 4:10 for 18 holes, with instruction from Jean that our cart was due back by 8:10. Nice guy, no problem. Starter, nice guy, no problem.
The problem starts on the 8th hole, with a marshal named …

One of my favourite courses. It's in great shape this year.  Pace of play is a bit too slow at times as their time of 8 minutes between tee times is not enough.  Also despite a sign saying pace of play is enforced, it is not true.  A double-par limit should be observed by all …

Fantastic course that is kept in great conditions.
Lots of elevation changes with alot of tight tree lined fairways.
Staff were friendly and courteous.
Me and my son had a great time and will be back again!
Absolutely the best course in the region for condition and cost! The course is always in immaculate condition. Staff are friendly! Never have been disappointed playing a round at Nation Golf Club!
First time golfing here and really enjoyed it. The course was challenging but fun and it was in really good shape. Looking forward to returning. The carts are pretty high tech love that about them.

stops.name: Megan Michelle
stops.hours: Monday: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM · Tuesday: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM…

meta.address: 955 Opeongo Rd, Renfrew, ON K7V 3Z5, Canada

reviews.text: I’m writing this from the course right now on holr 8, first time here and all I can say is this is the best golf course I have played at in terms of condition pace and general energy it has. I love the energy. The staff is super friendly. The greens are pure. the grass is lush…

This was my second time golfing and my wife's first. We used the driving range one day and came back a few days later to play 9 holes. The staff was very friendly, helpful and encouraging. We both enjoyed the challenging and well kept course. Definitely will be back, thank you.

Two courses in one. The front 9 is an open style links course that can be forgiving though its length makes it challenging.  The back 9 does not contain any flat fairways.   Precision is the key in order for your ball to not bounce into the tall fescue. This picturesque golf c…
The staff are very friendly, and the golf course is very well maintained. It was my first time visiting, but I think I’ll be coming more often next year.

What else is there to say about this course that hasn't already been said? The course maintenance is top notch, the rough and fairways are well cut and frame each hole. The greens are varied and well taken care of. The obstacles like bunkers and hazards are thoughtfully placed…

meta.address: 11937 Cloverdale Rd, Winchester, ON K0C 2K0, Canada

reviews.text: I havent played there yet but the prices are quite high for a course that isnt even rated 4 stars. How do you justify those prices?
Decent course at a value price. Well maintained and friendly staff.

Lost mt 8 iron at this course September 14. If anyone found it or took it I would really like it back, it's a daiwa brand trypower 2. It's got a sentimental value to it as it was given to me by my late cousin. It would be greatly appreciated.  Thanks

Always enjoy this track. Its a true links style course that can be pretty tricky when having to deal with the wind. Makes you feel like you are playing your own Open Championship. Pace of play can be a bit slow at times. Usually have some pretty decent specials throughout the …

First time playing and broke 90 for first time. Open yet challenging fairways. Conditions were nice. Got a free Hot dog and fries with October Fest which was super generous of the club to do. Really nice staff and greens were in great condition. Good selection of drinks too ; )

reviews.text: A very nice golf course in good shape. There’s lots of challenges with doglegs, narrow fairways and speedy greens. There’s lots service is friendly and you actually see effective Marshall’s. I’d recommend to visit if in town.

Been going to metcalf just about every weekend since this season started. Amazing course, challenging yet so much fun. I played yesterday the 10th and that’s what sparked this review. The changing of leafs makes this course even more beautiful. The greens are immaculate always…

Course is in amazing shape! Hit 18 and was extremely happy with all greens and fairways. Staff were great and helpful,  I took a little too long getting off on my tee time and the staff were super understanding. Ordered food and it was available to pick up at their entrance.
T…

Early October. Greens were punched last week and somehow still very playable. 1st time playing there but not the last. By next week the greens should be fabulous. Nice layout and we felt like we were alone on the golf course. Nobody pushing us or slowing us down.

Played the 9-hole and the 18-hole course. 18-hole is beautiful this time of year. Greens were perfect and running really fast. There was tournament play today so the pins were in very challenging locations. Overall, great experience.

meta.address: Sand Point, ON K0A 1G0, Canada

reviews.text: Gorgeous views and great staff with an excellent bar and restaurant. Fairways and greens could've been in better condition but o believe this is peak season (Mid June). Make sure to play 18 as the turn has some of the best views of the river.

Decent track in the Ottawa valley. Course is in good shape. Not a lot of overly challenging holes. A couple long par fours. A few easy doglegs. Not too much in the way of hazards in play. Staff was all friendly. Course is very open. The rough is fairly thick throughout. They m…
Amazing course and very affordable prices! Thank you for such a great time! Had a very nice putting and chipping area, I will be back to play again!!

This is my first time golfing Sand Point.  Challenging course, tough greens.

Soldi value, and great views of the Ottawa River from some holes.

A dog leg left and a dog leg right (both par 4s) make you strategically pit your driver away  bot on all other parts 4s and 5s, you …
Very nice and well kept 18 holes. Wonderful staff, reasonable pricing. Challenging for the average golfer.

meta.address: 1725 Kohlsmith Rd, Cobden, ON K0J 1K0, Canada

reviews.text: The gem only the locals seem to know about.  For the past few yearsvery I drive from Montreal to play golf in the Ottawa Valley.  I never miss this course.  Very well maintained, nice setup, challenging, and with lots of elevation. The greens had just been aerated so made putt…

I cannot say enough wonderful things about this golf club.  The course is beautiful and definitely has some challenges. Staff are amazing, super friendly and helpful.
The grounds crew have really brought the course back to life and work tirelessly to keep it in great shape!
Cl…

Oaks of Cobden

A considerably challenging course with tight fairways and fast, clean greens.

A pretty nice course and with the underpar deal it makes it an easy choice for a drive from Ottawa.

We will certainly play again!

l golf at Cobden every Ladies Day, and try to golf 18 holes a few times a year.  It's one of the best courses in the Ottawa Valley and the staff is top notch.  I would highly recommend the course to anyone who is interested in a beautiful, scenic and well maintained golf cours…
Course is very well maintained and the surroundings are beautiful!

meta.address: 844 Aurele Rd, Casselman, ON K0A 1M0, Canada

reviews.text: Decent course in okay condition. At almost $100 for the round I was somewhat disappointed with the condition of the fairways and greens. There are definitely better options around for the same or lower green fee.
Great course layout. Fairways n greens in excellent condition.

As a member this might be a biased review so read on but just be aware.

This course is in great shape yet again this year and the maintenance staff is out every morning in force getting things ready for the day (I know as I am often in the first group off the tee). They have …

Best ball tournament for Ride For Dad. Course was great. Staff were fabulous. The food was so good.... wraps and home fries for breakfast. We had a choice of pasta, I had lasagna with salad for our meal after our round of golf. Topped off with endless table of deserts. Excelle…

I Had my babyshower here, and it was perfect! The venue was large enough to hold all my 57 guests and have them seated at tables for a lunch. The food they provided was amazing! All my guest enjoyed and loved it!. My family was able to arrive ahead of time to set decorations, …

meta.address: 1108 Golf Course Rd, Renfrew, ON K7V 3Z6, Canada

reviews.text: It was a great night, start to finish. Booking was easy, when I called in to book the  lady I spoke to was very helpful as I wasn’t sure how long we would need. Once we got there Greg was a great host. Quick lesson to make sure we understood the simulators and then he let us g…

Beautiful place. Manicured and picturesque. Staff is great, manager Grieg is fantastic and very accommodating.
Offers a dining room with a pretty extensive menu. Food was delicious and good-sized portions.
Golf shop on the grounds, golf cart rentals. Offers side events as well…
Incredible course, fantastic condition. Hard but not impossible and visually stunning. Definitely a must play, a little far from Ottawa but definitely worth the drive. I will be back

Course in fabulous shape. Fairways green. Greens immaculate and very fast. Staff exceĺlent. Cart paths could use grading.Very small complaint but still giving 5.0 rating.
Will return!
Excellent conditions, beautiful scenery, and challenging while enjoyable. A great golf experience and must play venue in the Ottawa Valley.

meta.address: 981 Barryvale Rd, Calabogie, ON K0J 1H0, Canada

reviews.text: A friend and I drove over a hour and were excited to check out this course on a beautiful fall sunday morning.  We were riding and were paired up with another twosome walking and teed off.  Upon checking in there was a dog off leash roaming around that seemed to belong to the …

The resort is in a remote location, making it a quiet getaway. The golf course is picturesque and well maintained, a definite highlight of the property. The rooms are satisfactory—some upgrades have been made, though a few areas could still use finishing touches.

Beyond golf,…

I have used Calabogie Highland golf resort several times over the years for my annual Swine Cup golf tournament. The staff are amazing, the course is challenging and the villas for a stayover are perfect. The units are showing some wear and tear over the years and could use so…

Well loved our time here, loved our one bedroom villa. We stayed for 3 days but we had originally only booked two nights but wanted to stay an extra to do more sledding. The trails were magnificent so we just couldn’t leave yet.

Our villa was so clean and well appointed. We d…

What an amazing place in Barryvale, very close to Calabogie.  Golf course, villa, the water and the Social House are all within walking distance.  The service was excellent and the amenities were very good.  I will return for sure.

meta.fun_fact: Laid-back resort featuring suites, 2 golf courses and a casual restaurant with a bar.

meta.address: 4740 High, Gloucester, ON K1X 1B3, Canada

reviews.text: Course was in fine condition for being late in the season. Lots of water on the course today unfortunately. But that brought ducks & geese and even turkey vultures so that was nice lol. You gotta put up with A LOT of airplanes passing low overhead. Very friendly and helpful ma…

I'm a new member here this year. Opening conditions were extremely wet and hole 17 is likely a growing concern year after year but they are managing as best they can.

Greens were very slow to start but since mid Jun they have been getting quicker. I wouldn't call them fast bu…

Played the raceway 9 hole at Falcon Ridge. Fun but very challenging for beginners. With narrow fairways, encroached by trees, the course requires a lot of precision.

Otherwise the course and grounds were immaculate. Great driving range with tracking technology. Friendly staff…
Fun course with a nice design. Great value at under $50 to walk 18 on a weekend. Course in great shape as of mid October

Great place to golf. Not too busy so good for beginners but the first 3 holes on the 9 hole course are very tough. Fun course though with some tight fairways, nice greens, and a nice Mia of water and sand features.

reviews.text: Was my first time golfing in general and came here this fall with my friends we had a great time. Golf course was beautiful, and staff was very nice and gave me great tips for which way I swung. Excellent service! Really enjoyed playing golf with my friends here and if I am ba…

Great round of golf today with my buddies today. Greens we're fast and beautiful.  Tee boxes need some work.  Food between nines was amazing. I went for the BLT with and egg. What a huge sandwich. My friends went for the Buffalo wraps with fries. Very nice as well

Had a great experience playing today. This is a very hilly course with fantastic views and challenging elevated greens. Although the fairways and tee boxes were dry, this allowed the ball to roll greater distances. The greens were maintained well which still allowed for soft l…

Fabulous day golfing
Beautiful greens
Wonderful staff
Will keep coming back
Don’t hesitate to take the drive out to this picturesque golf course.
Beautiful course that give you challenges when you least expect it. We had a beautiful day and wonderful time. They have one of the most amazing patios for a little brew at the end of your game.

reviews.text: Played Whitetail Aug 19, the course was in great condition. Considering we were in a drought. Light rain all day, we had a great time. Well worth the drive, we will be back.

Absolutely beautiful course & excellent grounds crew & clubhouse employees. Accommodating for our small dog to sit on the cart during our round. Will definitely be returning for another round next summer.

Golfed Whitetail last week and was a bit wet after all the rain we had. Greens were aerated so slow but this is a favourite. We walk it which is a challenge in itself with all the hills. Only course I've ever played that first hole is a par 3. We'll be back.
This course is a real gem. I drove an hour and a half to get here, and I'll definitely be making the trip again. It's hands down my favorite course in the area. Great condition

We golfed there today, we’re not pros by any stretch of the imagination. The staff is amazing, in the pro shop as well as the restaurant. The greens are beautiful! The course is amazing, challenging but playable without beating yourself up at every hole. The fellow golfers wer…

scorecards.course: Timber Run Golf Club & Event Lodge

meta.address: 154 Caldwell St, Lanark, ON K0G 1K0, Canada

reviews.text: Well prepared all around. Verging 5🌟 !!!Playability/speed would improve with additional score card or course markings for layout, hazards, distances considering blind shots. Definitely a cart course on hot days - loads of elevation changes.
A beautiful location and beautiful day for a beautiful wedding!! The staff were incredibly nice and professional. Thank you for an amazing time!

Just a quick note.....
Paula and I had our wedding there August 3rd 2024 and coudn't be more pleased with the service from Timber Run thoughout all stages of planning our wedding.

We were intrigued with the pictures on their website but after our tour we couldn't believe how …
Incredible club house and banquet area!  The course was in good shape and some of the greens and pin placements were a challenge for me.    Beautifully maintained!

Timber Run Golf Club

A serious contender for best course I have played this year, a toss up between Marshes, the Canadian and Smugglers Glen.

A true favorite now, I will be back for sure.

Beautiful Clubhouse by the way!
Cheers

meta.fun_fact: Château Cartier Golf Course opened in 1923 and sits on the banks of the Ottawa River, offering views of the Champlain Bridge rapids and Parliament Hill's Peace Tower. It's considered one of Canada's best downtown golf resort experiences.

reviews.text:
By far one of the worst hotel stays I've ever had.
We checked in at about 10pm on a Wednesday.  When we got to the room I used the washroom.  The toilet paper holder was broken, the toilet paper was on the floor and the sink faucet was also broken.  The handle of the faucet wa…

My fiancé booked us a weekend getaway at the spa and a night at the hotel for my birthday and to celebrate our engagement. The spa was amazing but the hotel was very underwhelming for the price we paid. He mentioned it was for my birthday and to celebrate our engagement. Howev…

Just enjoyed a very nice stay at Chateau Cartier, which was part of a spa gift package. The booking couldn't have been easier, and the staff were friendly and very accommodating. We booked a King suite, and it was spotless, and we were able to check in early. The hotel is olde…

Love the location. Enjoyed services at the spa and Keona. Appreciate that you use bottles of shampoo, conditioner and body wash. Suggestions: change ripped lamp shade, mirror light is not working, doors are very dirty especially near the handles. The room would need some minor…

A cozy, old but well maintained hotel. Don't go expecting modern or luxurious facilities, and you won't be disappointed! Has all the basics and more, with gym, breakfast, in addition to the Spa and Golf based on the season.

Room got a little bit of a damp smell, nothing that …

reviews.text:
Awesome place for tubing, we had lots of fun.
Staff are very welcoming and helpful.

The only thing that disappointed us was the fact that one the websites it is mentioned (as well as photos) that there are 'family' tubes - with space for 3 persons. In reality, such thing didn…

Sadly, I was really disappointed in the condition of this golf course.
It was well overpriced for what you get for your buck....especially after driving nearly 1 hour to get there.
Don't get me wrong, I really love the layout of the course & the staff are nice & courteous.
Not…
Best customer service experience I’ve had at a golf course! The staff were really professional, accommodating, welcoming and eager to help. The course was also beautiful, especially in the fall! 🍁
Friendly staff and a challenging course that is in great shape for the price. Nothing beats fall golf here.

Dear Golf Edelweiss

Such a wonderful day 9/15/23 !  😎

Thank you sincerely to Gabby, Duncan & the whole Golf Edelweiss Team for the gracious hospitality.

Coming from Vermont we truly appreciated your scenic (Hole 14 !!) & supremely well cared for Course.  Playing the Back 9 …

reviews.text: A fun course , in decent condition. The carts need an upgrade tho
We went at 4 pm for Twilight and it was nice and quiet as far as not being rushed etc. Twisted pines wasn't in bad shape. If you do go fo Twilight definitely bring your bug spray!

I’m a very new golfer and I sincerely appreciate everything about Madawaska Golf Course. Locally owned by Rick Munro, this club is run very well. The staff team are extremely friendly and always accommodating. Sumac is a par 3 and perfect for me to learn the sport and my clubs…
5 star for being the cheapest course around! If you want a quick round, and do not want to spend a lot of money, this course is great. I played their par 61 course as I try to improve my short game.

STAFF: absolutely amazing super super nice people always friendly and helpful.

PRICE: very good price you get a lot more for a lot less, I have played courses that cost 2x more and are way worse. The crew at madawaska take pride in this course and you can see it.

MAINTINANCE…

stops.name: Sweet and Sassy co.
stops.hours: Monday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM · Tuesday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM…

meta.address: 4175 Anderson Road, Ottawa, ON, K0A 1K0
meta.fun_fact: Designed by Canadian architect Graham Cooke. The original 18 (East/West) opened July 2007; the South nine was added in 2012, creating today’s 27-hole layout with three rotating combinations.

reviews.text: Easy, boring, wide open course. Hard to tell the rough from the fairways. As a single walking cost me 70$… same price as many private clubs this time of year, feeling ripped off.

This has been bothering me for a while now.The owner of the facility doesn’t seem to care about the players well being.More than once ,they spray  pesticides during the day.I go there to enjoy the great outdoors,not very plaisant not healthy at all.I wish they would spray late…

Worst experience at a golf course yet, I overheard my server get tormented by their manager, from what I heard named was Morgan. Morgan was incredibly rude to not just me but also the other workers at the course. I would not recommend anyone come here for dining or buying anyt…

I really like this course and its pricing. It’s challenging, great views in the Fall, and everyone has always been super nice (even people I get paired up with). Also, during October, they do Oktoberfest and your round comes with a free hot dog. Let me tell you, the hot dog wa…

First time playing golf in Canada and found this course. Nice open course with some good hazards. Ended up in a 4 ball with other guys and had a great time. Fairways not the best, greens pretty good. Will definitely play here again if I visit Canada again.
